creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #0)
> Created attachment 194097 [details]
> Proposed patch
> 
> Hi again Chris,
> 
> After some discussion, it seems it is better to move the icons distribution
> elsewhere. I placed them in my account.
> 
> Just FYI, other ports (print/jabref, misc/mc, editors/openoffice-devel)
> should get rid of its binary files in files/ at some point so this is not an
> issue for this specific port.
> 
> Cheers

Thanks for the effort!

Upstream released version 4.3 on 06-06. Which they claim
to be a major upgrade. So I filed a separate pr(1), accordingly:
  bug #229159

So this pr can probably be closed. :-)

Thanks again!

--Chris
